ideation: This animation sequence will depict a robot admiring a Japanese castle, starting with arms at its sides, then raising them in awe, and finally bringing them back to a relaxed position.  The robot's movements will be slow and deliberate to reflect contemplation and appreciation.

frames.beat: arms hang relaxed, ready to admire
both arms slowly rise, taking in the view
arms reach out in a gesture of awe and wonder
arms return to rest, the vision imprinted
